name: Hospital Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket and Hat Gift Set - Blue and White Stripes - 2pk - Cloud Island™
description:
This Hospital Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket and Hat Gift Set from cloud island™ is a thoughtful gift to welcome home new parents and baby. This two-piece set includes a 47-inch square muslin swaddle blanket and a knitted beanie hat to keep baby warm all day and night. Decorated with white and blue stripes for a touch of nautical flair, both items in the set are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for comfortable use and convenient cleaning.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
